summary: Enhanced GRN module testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (35/35 tests passed). Frontend UI shows comprehensive GRN functionality with all required fields and workflows operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button (×) selector not working reliably

integration_issues.issue: Modal overlay intercepting clicks on status filter dropdown

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

passed_tests: GRN list displays with all required columns (GRN Number, Vendor, PO #, Items, Received, Accepted, Rejected, Status, Receipt Date, Actions)
Create GRN dialog opens with all enhanced fields (vendor, PO, invoice, receipt date, material, received qty, batch, mfg date, expiry date, storage condition, bin location)
Create GRN with full tracking fields successfully
GRN appears in list after creation
Quality inspection dialog opens with all required fields (Accepted, Rejected, Status, Bin Location, Rejection Reason)
View GRN dialog shows comprehensive details (vendor, PO, invoice, status, receipt date, received by, quantities)
Enhanced GRN creation with all new fields (35/35 backend tests passed)
Multiple GRN entries for same material allowed
Stock updates only for accepted quantities when GRN completed
GRN filtering by status and vendor working
Backward compatibility with old GRN records maintained
